Find and analyze the GSD UAT (User Acceptance Testing) file structure. Look for:

1. Where UAT files...

operations.command:
cd /tmp/claude-config && git add scripts/roadmaptoissues.py && git commit -m "feat(sync): add UAT tracking to bidirectional sync

- Parse UAT files from .planning/phases/*/XX-UAT.md
- Create GitHub Issues for UAT failures with uat-issue label
- Track UAT verification status (phases passed)
- Map UAT severity to priority labels
- Include root cause in issue body

UAT workflow:
1. /gsd:verify-work creates XX-UAT.md with test results
2. Sync creates issues for any failures
3. /gsd:plan-fix addresses issues
4. Re-run verification until all pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>" && git push

operations.command:
python3 -c "
import re
pattern = re.compile(r'^-\s+(UAT-\d+):\s+(.+?)\s+\((\w+)\)\s+-\s+Test\s+(\d+)')
lines = [
    '- UAT-099-001: System crashes on empty input (blocker) - Test 2',
    '- UAT-001: System crashes on empty input (blocker) - Test 2',
]
for line in lines:
    match = pattern.match(line)
    print(f'{line[:50]}... -> {match.groups() if match else \"NO MATCH\"}')"

echo "=== Missing from GitHub ===" && comm -23 /tmp/roadmap_plans.txt /tmp/github_plans.txt && echo "" && echo "=== Checking ROADMAP status for missing plans ===" && for plan in $(comm -23 /tmp/roadmap_plans.txt /tmp/github_plans.txt); do grep -E "^\s*-\s*\[.\]\s*${plan}:" .planning/ROADMAP.md | head -1; done
operations.description: Identify missing plans and their status

operations.command: echo "=== UAT Files ===" && find .planning/phases -name "*-UAT.md" -exec echo "File: {}" \; -exec grep -E "^status:|^total:|^passed:|^issues:" {} \; && echo "" && echo "=== GitHub UAT Issues ===" && gh issue list --label uat-issue --state all --json number,title,state --jq '.[] | "\(.number): [\(.state)] \(.title)"'
echo "=== Sync Script Features ===" && grep -E "^def |^class " /tmp/claude-config/scripts/roadmaptoissues.py | head -30

echo "=== ROADMAP Phases ===" && grep -E "^\*\*Phase [0-9]+:" .planning/ROADMAP.md | head -12 && echo "" && echo "=== GitHub Milestones ===" && gh api repos/:owner/:repo/milestones --jq '.[] | "\(.number): [\(.state)] \(.title) (\(.open_issues) open, \(.closed_issues) closed)"' | sort -t: -k1 -n

echo "=== Project Board Items ===" && gh project item-list 14 --owner gptcompany --format json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.items | group_by(.status) | map({status: .[0].status, count: length})' 2>/dev/null || echo "Could not fetch project items"

echo "=== Issue Title Comparison ===" && gh issue list --label gsd-plan --state open --json number,title --jq '.[] | "\(.number): \(.title)"' | while read line; do
  num=$(echo "$line" | cut -d: -f1)
  title=$(echo "$line" | cut -d: -f2- | sed 's/^ *//')
  plan_id=$(echo "$title" | grep -oE "Plan-[0-9]+-[0-9]+" | sed 's/Plan-//')
  if [ -n "$plan_id" ]; then
    roadmap_title=$(grep -E "^\s*-\s*\[.\]\s*${plan_id}:" .planning/ROADMAP.md | sed 's/.*\[.\] //' | head -1)
    expected="[Plan-${plan_id}] ${roadmap_title}"
    if [ "$title" != "$expected" ]; then
      echo "MISMATCH #$num:"
      echo "  GitHub: $title"
      echo "  Expected: $expected"
    fi
  fi
done | head -30
echo "=== Issues Without Milestones ===" && gh issue list --label gsd-plan --state open --json number,title,milestone --jq '.[] | select(.milestone == null) | "\(.number): \(.title)"'

echo "=== Issues Missing phase- Label ===" && gh issue list --label gsd-plan --state open --json number,title,labels --jq '.[] | select([.labels[].name | startswith("phase-")] | any | not) | "\(.number): \(.title)"'
